weakest_union: Section 6 exclusion clause uses inconsistent grammatical structures and a subjective 'reasonably understands' standard, reducing professional register
Section 10 uses 'sentence' rather than 'provision', a minor drafting anomaly
Undefined term 'Representatives' used in Section 2 (Affiliates and Representatives) without a corresponding definition, breaking internal coherence.

Section 6 Exclusions uses non-standard, vague phrasing (e.g., 'reasonably understands was already known,' 'becomes available from any source,' 'can be used in Recipient's ordinary business without reference') that undermines clarity and is a drafting-register anomaly.
